wbs_text: Fix broken bug-reporter deploy image: committed src/db.js requires @raike/lib-db but manifest omits it / uncommitted add uses file:../../packages (outside Docker build context). Vendor lib-db into vendor/lib-db, repoint package.json file:./vendor/lib-db, ensure knex+mysql2 present, regen lockfile online, Docker build+boot verify, guard test. Mirrors 999.407. Deploy/build/Docker surface.
